title: Crispy Cherry Dumplings
description: A twist on traditional Chinese dumplings, these crispy cherry dumplings are a sweet and savory delight. They're perfect for a dessert or snack.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together cherry, soy sauce, and sugar.
Lay a wonton wrapper on a flat surface and place a small spoonful of the cherry mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with water and fold the wrapper into a triangle, pressing the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat and add a small amount of oil.
When the oil is hot, add the dumplings to the skillet and cook until they're golden brown and crispy.
Serve the dumplings hot with a sprinkle of sesame seeds on top.
